require "std"

# Define the modulus
MOD = 1_000_000_007

# Maximum value for array elements
V_MAX = 5000

# Function to calculate the sum of digits of a number
fn digit_sum(n : Int64) : Int64
  s = 0
  while n > 0
    s += n % 10
    n /= 10
  end
  s
end

# Main solution function
def solve(digitSum : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  n = digitSum.size

  s_values = Array(V_MAX + 1, Int64)
  for v in 0..V_MAX

    # 1. Calculate Prefix Sums of dp_prev

    dp_curr = Array(V_MAX + 1, Int64)

        dp_curr[v] = ps_prev[v]
      else

      end
    end
    
    # Update for next iteration
    dp_prev = dp_curr
  end
  
  # Final result: Sum of all ways to end the array at any valid value v
  total_count = 0

  end
